calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Gregory Cleaver, Esq. and Anthony Schoenberg, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Presidio Group LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Richard Garlinghouse and Michael Chinn, were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony, reviewing and considering of the evidence and exhibits presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Michelle Banks, aka Shelley Banks, aka Michelle Puerta, aka Michelle Acquistapace as follows:
Damages $600,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $105,445.32
Costs $526.00, for a total of $705,971.32
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Continued To May-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
